name: Dasi Spa Manager
author: Poki
description: Dasi Spa Manager is a management game where your goal is to run the best spa in town! You'll have to start small, with a couple of massage rooms that you'll have to clean up after each guest. As you go, you'll expand your resort with more rooms and pools while hiring helpful staff to keep things running smoothly. With every upgrade, make your resort even more amazing. Think you have what it takes to make your Spa Resort a success? How to play Dasi Spa Manager? Use WASD, the arrow keys or the mouse to move around! Who created Dasi Spa Manager? Dasi Spa Manager was created by Dasi Games. Play their other games on Poki!: Dasi Hospital Manager , Office Manager and Dasi Library Manager How can I play Dasi Spa Manager for free? You can play Dasi Spa Manager for free on Poki. Can I play Dasi Spa Manager on mobile devices and desktop? Dasi Spa Manager can be played on your computer and mobile devices like phones and tablets.
